description: Read-after-pod-reap integration spec failed consistently. Root cause was a TEST RACE (deleteProducerPod killed the get pod mid-fetch), not artifact routing. Fixed by gating pod deletion on the intermediate step running + targeting by concourse.ci/step label; also wired daemonClient onto WrapVolumeForLookup volumes for read resilience. CI build #184 green (128 passed, 0 failed).
